source: 2024 Guidelines for Admission for Holders of National Senior Certificate

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Science in Engineering in Civil Engineering
notes: Main requirement uses the lowest listed possible-admission band where available.
FPS is the Faculty Points Score.
WPS is the Weighted Points Score and applies to South African applicants only.
Mathematical Literacy or Technical Mathematics cannot be substituted for Mathematics.
Technical Science cannot be substituted for Physical Sciences.
NBTs are not required for programmes in the Faculty of Engineering & the Built Environment.
Eligible applicant group: Only South African applicants in targeted redress categories.
Admission band used: Band C.
Admission outcome: Possible admission.
Score requirement: 420 FPS or above.
Notes: Probable admission: 480 WPS or above.; Guaranteed admission: 500 FPS or above..

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Architectural Studies
notes: Main requirement uses the lowest listed possible-admission band where available.
FPS is the Faculty Points Score.
WPS is the Weighted Points Score and applies to South African applicants only.
Mathematical Literacy or Technical Mathematics cannot be substituted for Mathematics.
Technical Science cannot be substituted for Physical Sciences.
NBTs are not required for programmes in the Faculty of Engineering & the Built Environment.
Eligible applicant group: Only South African applicants in targeted redress categories.
Admission band used: Band C.
Admission outcome: Possible admission.
Score requirement: 348 FPS or above.
Notes: Probable admission: 408 WPS or above with Architecture Portfolio Score of 68% or above.; Guaranteed admission: 450 FPS or above with Architecture Portfolio Score of 75% or above..
Additional subject or selection requirements: Architecture_Portfolio_Score: 50% or above.
